BackstoryDef.title: corporate heir
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was raised to inherit a position of corporate authority. [PAWN_possessive] education was comprehensive, rigorous, and specifically designed to produce someone capable of managing complex systems. [PAWN_pronoun] absorbed everything.

BackstoryDef.title: penthouse student
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] grew up on the upper floors of a Dominion tower complex, educated by private tutors and largely unaware of what the floors below looked like. [PAWN_pronoun] was taught that this was normal.

BackstoryDef.title: dominion academy scholar
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] attended one of the Dominion's most prestigious academies, where the children of the ruling class are educated in corporate governance and little else. [PAWN_pronoun] excelled and found the questions [PAWN_possessive] instructors preferred not to answer more interesting than the ones they did.

BackstoryDef.title: sunfloor garden keeper
BackstoryDef.description: On the highest floors of Eisengrad, where the sunlight is real and the air is clean, [PAWN_nameDef] maintained the ornamental gardens that signal upper class status. [PAWN_pronoun] developed a genuine interest in plant life that [PAWN_possessive] family considered an acceptable eccentricity.

BackstoryDef.title: private hunt club initiate
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was inducted into one of the upper class hunting clubs from childhood, learning to track and handle live prey in the sealed hunting grounds of [PAWN_possessive] family's tower complex. [PAWN_pronoun] was better at it than most of [PAWN_possessive] peers and liked it less than any of them.

BackstoryDef.title: cultural patron's child
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was raised attending the exclusive galleries and performances that the upper class use to demonstrate their refinement. [PAWN_pronoun] developed genuine taste and genuine ability, though [PAWN_pronoun] was never sure whether to be proud of either given what funded them.

BackstoryDef.title: private academy artist
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] attended a private academy where artistic education was considered an essential component of upper class formation. [PAWN_pronoun] excelled at it in a way that surprised [PAWN_possessive] tutors and discomforted [PAWN_possessive] parents, who had expected a more businesslike child.

BackstoryDef.title: corporate dueling student
BackstoryDef.description: Among the Dominion's upper class, formal dueling is a tradition used to resolve disputes that cannot be settled through negotiation. [PAWN_nameDef] was trained in its forms from childhood, learning a combat discipline that was simultaneously a martial art and a social performance.

BackstoryDef.title: exclusive martial arts initiate
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef]'s family enrolled [PAWN_objective] in one of the upper class martial academies, where the techniques taught were as much about the performance of controlled violence as the execution of it. [PAWN_pronoun] mastered both and developed a preference for the one [PAWN_possessive] instructors considered secondary.

BackstoryDef.title: private range champion
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] competed in the private marksmanship circuits maintained by the upper class social clubs, winning consistently from an early age. [PAWN_pronoun] developed a technical understanding of ballistics that [PAWN_possessive] fellow competitors found unsettling.

BackstoryDef.title: tower banquet organizer
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was organizing [PAWN_possessive] family's formal banquets from an early age, learning that on the upper floors what is served and how it is served communicates things that no conversation can.

BackstoryDef.title: oligarch's social heir
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was raised to inherit [PAWN_possessive] family's social capital alongside their financial capital. [PAWN_pronoun] mastered the lesson completely and spent considerable time afterward deciding what to do with it.

BackstoryDef.title: corporate medical heir
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef]'s family controlled one of the Dominion's largest private medical corporations. [PAWN_pronoun] was educated accordingly, with access to equipment and expertise that most of the population would never see.

BackstoryDef.title: mineral rights heir
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was educated from childhood in the management and exploitation of the mineral rights that constitute a significant portion of [PAWN_possessive] family's corporate holdings. [PAWN_pronoun] learned the legal, technical, and logistical dimensions of resource extraction and quietly noted what they left out.

BackstoryDef.title: tower defense planner
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was involved in planning the defensive arrangements of [PAWN_possessive] family's tower holdings from childhood. [PAWN_pronoun] developed a tactical understanding of ranged combat that made [PAWN_possessive] family's security staff quietly respectful.
